Memorandum of Understanding signed between our University and Sultan Zainal Abidin University

01.03.2024

During the visit of the delegation of Sultan Zainal Abidin University of Malaysia to our University, it was decided to cooperate to increase their academic knowledge and to realize joint projects.

Vice Rector of Sultan Zainal Abidin University of Malaysia Prof. Dato' Fadzli bin Adam and the accompanying delegation visited our Rector Prof. Atilla Arkan in his office on Friday, March 1. During the visit, a memorandum of understanding was signed including the areas of cooperation envisaged between the two universities. During the talks held during the visit, it was decided that the relevant units of Ibn Haldun University and Sultan Zainal Abidin University of Malaysia will come together in the coming days and work on projects to be implemented on the agreed issues.

The signed memorandum of understanding provides a framework for joint projects and studies between the students of the two universities through Erasmus+ exchange programs, as well as joint scientific studies between academics and increasing the academic knowledge of the two universities.
